criteria.text: Per-provider parse: Provider Totals month tabs + Chiro Numbers file (providers as row labels, stacked weekly blocks) summed per provider per month via the row-label grid parser; TOTAL/DATE/day-header rows excluded
Provider-name normalization: case/whitespace variants (Gunn/Gunn , Osman/osman) merge to one provider; genuinely different names stay separate
Current vs prior month, calendar-capped (MAD-45), year-aware for the Chiro file year-suffixed tabs; no future/phantom data; current month computed in the practice zone
Additive DTO + By-provider panel: /api/reports adds a providers section (name, current, prior) without changing the metrics DTO; Reports renders a color-blind-safe panel sorted by encounters
Chiro file included (multi-file): its chiropractors are part of the breakdown; externalLinks read as cached values
HIPAA audit + PHI-safe logging: read audited (item refs, no cell values); unmapped/parse warnings carry references only, never cell values or the raw URL (provider names are staff, not patient PHI)
